title: boerhavia repens var. glutinosa
intro: Boerhavia repens var. glutinosa, also known as the "Herbe à Soie" or "Hairy Hogweed", is a type of plant that belongs to the Nyctaginaceae family. This plant is traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, including its diuretic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Boerhavia repens var. glutinosa include its ability to help with fever reduction, kidney function improvement, and relief from menstrual cramps and other gastrointestinal issues. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or decoctions, which are often used to treat various health conditions, and it can also be used as a natural remedy in the form of powder, tincture, or capsules.
